nasb.text: and two doors of cypress wood; the two leaves of the one door turned on pivots, and the two leaves of the other door turned on pivots.

esv.text: and two doors of cypress wood. The two leaves of the one door were folding, and the two leaves of the other door were folding.

cnv.text: 用松木做的兩扇門，這一扇有兩葉，是疊合在一起的，那一扇也有兩葉，也是疊合在一起的。

ccb.text: 两扇门是松木造的，每一扇门都分为可折叠的两片，
